column3: Inspections: Surveys and assessments of development sites, road improvements, traffic conditions.
column4:
The main purpose of the flight plan will be for April 8th the day of the solar eclipse to monitor traffic conditions to assist with responding units by advising what streets are open.   In the event there could be a fire or other emergency related item that a visual view of the area is possible if close to the operation of the flight.  A visual view may be performed to advise incoming units.   

For example if there is a report of smoke in the area that drone operations are being performed and the drone can verify that the smoke is not an emergency such as a grill, responders can be informed to be disregarded to reduce the risk of responding to an emergency call.
